about.title: About SuppleLogic | Trusted Supplement Reviews & Wellness Insights
about.description: Learn about SuppleLogic, a trusted supplement review platform providing unbiased wellness insights, ingredient research, and educational health content worldwide.

hero.title: Honest Supplement Reviews &
hero.description: Welcome to SuppleLogic — your trusted destination for honest, research-driven supplement reviews and wellness insights. At SuppleLogic, our mission is simple: to help people make smarter, safer, and more informed decisions about dietary supplements. With thousands of products on the market and bold claims everywhere, choosing the right supplement can feel confusing. That’s where we come in.

story.title: Who We Are
content: SuppleLogic is an independent supplement review and information platform dedicated to analyzing health, fitness, and wellness supplements from around the world. We focus on popular categories such as weight management, dental health, immunity, digestion, sleep, and overall well-being.

We are not manufacturers. We don’t create or sell supplements. Our role is to research, review, and simplify supplement information so you can understand what a product is, how it works, and whether it may suit your lifestyle.

values.title: Our Review Process
values.description: Every product featured on SuppleLogic is evaluated using a structured and transparent approach, including:

items.title: Review of manufacturer claims and product positioning
Assessment of publicly available user feedback
Comparison with similar products in the same category
Our goal is to present balanced, easy-to-understand reviews without hype or fear-based marketing.

certifications.title: Why Trust SuppleLogic?
certifications.description: We believe supplements should support a healthy lifestyle — not replace professional medical advice, a balanced diet, or proper exercise.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Answers to the most common questions about SuppleLogic and our reviews.

items.question: Is SuppleLogic a supplement manufacturer?
items.answer: No. We are an independent review platform. We don’t create or sell supplements. Our role is to research, review, and simplify supplement information.

items.question: How do you ensure your reviews are unbiased?
items.answer: Our reviews are based on a transparent process including ingredient analysis, user feedback, and safety considerations. Affiliate relationships do not influence our reviews or recommendations.

items.question: Does SuppleLogic provide medical advice?
items.answer: No. The information provided on SuppleLogic is for educational and informational purposes only and is not intended as medical advice. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional.

items.question: What is your affiliate disclosure?
items.answer: Some links on SuppleLogic may be affiliate links, which means we may earn a small commission if you choose to make a purchase through them — at no additional cost to you. These commissions help us maintain the website.

reviews.title: What Our Customers Say
reviews.subtitle: Real stories from real people who transformed their lives with our supplements.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: After just a few weeks of taking Mitolyn, I noticed a huge boost in my daily energy. I feel lighter, more focused, and the stubborn weight finally started coming off. Highly recommend this supplement!

reviews.name: James R.
reviews.text: I’ve tried countless supplements for weight loss, but nothing worked until Mitolyn. Not only did it help with fat loss, but I also feel sharper mentally. A real game-changer.

reviews.name: Anjalina S.
reviews.text: I started using ProDentim about three weeks ago, and the results are amazing. My gums feel healthier, bleeding has stopped, and my breath stays fresh all day. I’ve tried many dental supplements, but this is the only one that actually worked. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Rick Smith
reviews.text: ProDentim has completely changed my dental routine. I noticed a big reduction in plaque and sensitivity within the first month. My dentist even asked what I was using! This probiotic is definitely worth the money.

reviews.name: Rahul S.
reviews.text: I started using Sleep Lean because my sleep cycle was completely disturbed. Within a few days, I was sleeping deeper and waking up refreshed. After a few weeks, I noticed reduced cravings and gradual weight loss. It feels like a clean, natural sleep supplement.

reviews.name: Emily R.
reviews.text: Sleep Lean helped me fall asleep faster without making me feel drowsy in the morning. My stress levels went down, and I slowly started losing weight without changing much in my routine. I like that it’s non-habit forming and gentle.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: After a week of using BellyFlush, my bloating was almost gone. My stomach feels lighter and digestion is much better.

reviews.name: Daniel R.
reviews.text: I’ve tried many gut cleanse products, but BellyFlush worked gently without cramps. I feel more comfortable daily.
